source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 시험소/06. Usability 보완_250103/05. 주요 부품 인증서 + 사양서/60-2230C/CS-RoHS3_WiFi.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Laird Connectivity states that listed Wi-Fi products comply with RoHS 3 restricted substance requirements.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as supplier/manufacturer RoHS 3 compliance evidence for listed Laird Connectivity Wi-Fi modules, including 60-2230C Series models.
keyPoints: RoHS 3 or EU 2015/863 maintains RoHS 2 restrictions and adds four restricted substances.
The statement lists restricted substance thresholds for Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr+6, PBB, PBDE, DEHP, BBP, DBP, and DIBP.
Compliance is stated as verified by internal design controls, Laird Connectivity declarations, and/or analytical test data.
The 60-2230C Series listed as currently compliant includes ST60-2230C, ST60-2230C-P, ST60-2230C-PU, ST60-2230C-SS, ST60-2230C-U, and ST60-2230C-UU.

entities.name: Jonathan Kaye
entities.evidence: Sincerely, Jonathan Kaye Product Director Laird Connectivity

entities.name: RoHS 3
entities.evidence: The updated RoHS Directive (RoHS 3 or EU 2015/863) maintains the same restrictions as EU Directive 2011/65/EU or RoHS 2.0

concepts.name: RoHS 3 compliance
concepts.evidence: The updated RoHS Directive (RoHS 3 or EU 2015/863) maintains the same restrictions as EU Directive 2011/65/EU or RoHS 2.0 but extends the restrictions to include four new restricted substances.

concepts.name: Restricted substance thresholds
concepts.evidence: Lead – Pb <0.1% (1000 ppm) Mercury – Hg <0.1% (1000 ppm) Cadmium – Cd <0.01% (100 ppm)

concepts.name: RoHS exemption for lead in glass or ceramic
concepts.evidence: Electrical and electronic components containing lead in a glass or ceramic other than dielectric ceramic in capacitors

concepts.name: Supplier compliance verification
concepts.evidence: Compliance with the above specifications has been verified by way of internal design controls, Laird Connectivity declarations, and/or analytical test data.

evidence.claim: Laird Connectivity Wi-Fi product compliance to environmental protection measures and policies is supported by material composition test reports and/or compliance declarations.
evidence.evidenceText: Laird Connectivity Wi-Fi product compliance to environmental protection measures and policies is ensured by material composition test reports and/or compliance declarations provided by suppliers and manufacturers.

evidence.claim: RoHS 3 is identified as EU 2015/863 and is described as extending RoHS 2.0 restrictions with four additional restricted substances.
evidence.evidenceText: The updated RoHS Directive (RoHS 3 or EU 2015/863) maintains the same restrictions as EU Directive 2011/65/EU or RoHS 2.0 but extends the restrictions to include four new restricted substances.

evidence.claim: The listed restricted substance thresholds include Pb, Hg, Cr+6, PBB, PBDE, DEHP, BBP, DBP, and DIBP at less than 0.1% and Cd at less than 0.01%.
evidence.evidenceText: Lead – Pb <0.1% (1000 ppm) Mercury – Hg <0.1% (1000 ppm) Cadmium – Cd <0.01% (100 ppm) Hexavalent Chrome – (Cr+6) <0.1% (1000 ppm) Polybrominated Biphenyls – PBB <0.1% (1000 ppm) Polybrominated Diphenyl Ethers – PBDE <0.1% (1000 ppm) Bis(2-Ethylhexyl) phthalate – DEHP <0.1% (1000 ppm) Benzyl butyl phthalate – BBP <0.1% (1000 ppm) Dibutyl phthalate – DBP <0.1% (1000 ppm) Diisobutyl phthalate – DIBP <0.1% (1000 ppm)

evidence.claim: Laird Connectivity Wi-Fi products use an exemption for electrical and electronic components containing lead in certain glass or ceramic materials.
evidence.evidenceText: Laird Connectivity Wi-Fi products meet the above specification through utilization of exemption as defined below: Electrical and electronic components containing lead in a glass or ceramic other than dielectric ceramic in capacitors

evidence.claim: Compliance was verified by internal design controls, Laird Connectivity declarations, and/or analytical test data.
evidence.evidenceText: Compliance with the above specifications has been verified by way of internal design controls, Laird Connectivity declarations, and/or analytical test data.

evidence.claim: The 60-2230C Series products listed as currently compliant are ST60-2230C, ST60-2230C-P, ST60-2230C-PU, ST60-2230C-SS, ST60-2230C-U, and ST60-2230C-UU.

No revision or version number is present in the source text.
Authority or jurisdiction is inferred from references to EU directives rather than a separately named issuing authority.
